creator: ardovm@yahoo.it
text:
Upstream issue 125431 (https://bz.apache.org/ooo/show_bug.cgi?id=125431) reports that password-protected documents may not be opened and saved due to problems with libnss.

I was personally encountering the same issue. This bug report is to propose integration of the upstream patch into the FreeBSD port. The patch seems to solve the problem on my system, allowing me to open and save password-protected files again.

$ uname -a
FreeBSD myhost 9.3-STABLE FreeBSD 9.3-STABLE #140 r293654M: Mon Jan 11 09:55:00 CET 2016     root@myhost:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  i386

$ svn info /usr/ports | grep Revision
Revision: 405768
